master_plan.worker_prompt: Fix 3 issues: (1) add draw equity protection to fold gate, (2) restore anti-bot4 detection, (3) increase bet sizing constants

reviewer_feedback: Reviewer approved score 8/10. All fixes applied: bet sizing increased 5-11% across streets, anti-bot4 restored, draw equity protection added to fold gate. Minor risks: gutshot draws not protected (only 4 outs), preflop 3-bet +11% may create expensive barrels when behind.
